services.llm_usage_prompt: To use EruditePay TRON: Top Pairs, call https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/tron/dex/top-pairs with x402 payment of 0.003 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Top trending pools on Tron by volume or liquidity
services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call EruditePay TRON: Top Pairs
resp = requests.get("https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/tron/dex/top-pairs")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 3000 USDC micro-units
